title: War On Babylon
html: C9 D You cast your spells upon the land G Em7 Your lies of pleasure and false glee C9 D You enslave the hearts of men G Em7 With the illusion of being free C9 D You give away your copycats G Em7 You could never satisfy C9 D But there is one coming for you G Em7 And you cannot escape his eyes C9 D Tremble and fear, oh Babylon G Em7 Tremble and fear C9 D To escape your fake delight G Em7 The son of light has set them free ( C9 D G Em7 ) C9 D Your treats smell good but taste like death G Em7 You lure them all into your traps C9 D Your gifts were never ever sweet G Em7 They are as bitter as your sting C9 D But there's a new humanity G Em7 One that will not bend their knees C9 D They're waging war on Babylon G Em7 The son of man has set them free C9 D Tremble and fear, oh Babylon G Em7 Tremble and fear C9 D To escape your fake delight G Em7 The son of light has set them free G Em7 I'm waging war on Babylon C9 D To see you lose your filthy throne G Em7 Until the grips of your domain C9 D Are forgotten, old and gone G Em7 I'm waging war on Babylon C9 D Until the day my victor's throne G Em7 Is seen from all across the land C9 D And sin will never be again G Em7 Sin will never be again C9 D Sin will never be again G Em7 Sin will never be again
